seoTitle: Pentland Hills vs Percydale — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Pentland Hills and Percydale. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Pentland Hills vs Percydale: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Pentland Hills and Percydale.
heading: Pentland Hills vs Percydale — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Pentland Hills, Victoria and Percydale, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Pentland Hills has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Percydale (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Pentland Hills or Percydale safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Pentland Hills has a flood risk score of 30/100, while Percydale scores 24/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Pentland Hills scores 30/100 for bushfire risk. Percydale scores 63/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Pentland Hills or Percydale?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Pentland Hills has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.35% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
